title: ‘Life is a Miracle,’ but learning from disasters isn’t: Lessons from Japan’s 2011 earthquake and tsunami
description: Memorials, monuments, preserved school buildings and found objects form part of a memory culture that keeps conversations about risk reduction going.
content: In April 2012, a Harley-Davidson motorcycle was found on Graham Island in the Haida Gwaii archipelago off the coast of British Columbia. It belonged to Ikuo Yokoyama, a survivor of the earthquake and… [+7143 chars]
de: „Das Leben ist ein Wunder“, aber aus Katastrophen zu lernen ist es nicht: Lehren aus dem Erdbeben und Tsunami in Japan 2011. Gedenkstätten, Denkmäler, erhaltene Schulgebäude und Fundstücke sind Teil einer Erinnerungskultur, die Gespräche über Risikominderung am Laufen hält.
en: ‘Life is a Miracle,’ but learning from disasters isn’t: Lessons from Japan’s 2011 earthquake and tsunami. Memorials, monuments, preserved school buildings and found objects form part of a memory culture that keeps conversations about risk reduction going.
la: 'Vita est Miraculum', sed discere calamitatibus non est: Lectiones de Iaponia 2011 terrae motu et tsunami. Memoriae, monumenta, aedificia scholae conservata et res inventae pertinent ad memoriam culturae pertinentem, quae sermones de periculo reductionis custodit.

title: Tsunami risk in the Mediterranean: why Nice should prepare an evacuation plan
description: A tsunami risk in the Mediterranean is real. Coastal towns like Nice can get “Tsunami ready” by coordinating fast, effective preventive and awareness-raising efforts.
content: According to UNESCO, in 2022, there is a 100% chance of a tsunami of at least one metre high in the Mediterranean Sea in the next 30 years. France’s Côte d’Azur happens to be one of the most sei… [+10362 chars]
de: Tsunami-Risiko im Mittelmeer: ​​Warum Nizza einen Evakuierungsplan vorbereiten sollte. Die Gefahr eines Tsunamis im Mittelmeer ist real. Küstenstädte wie Nizza können sich „auf den Tsunami vorbereiten“, indem sie schnelle, wirksame Präventions- und Sensibilisierungsmaßnahmen koordinieren.
en: Tsunami risk in the Mediterranean: why Nice should prepare an evacuation plan. A tsunami risk in the Mediterranean is real. Coastal towns like Nice can get “Tsunami ready” by coordinating fast, effective preventive and awareness-raising efforts.
la: Tsunami periculum in Mediterraneo est: quare Nicaenum consilium evacuationis parare debet. Periculum tsunami in Mediterraneo reale est. Oppida maritima sicut Nicea potest "Tsunami parata" disponere ieiunium, efficax praecaventiae et conscientiae nisus suscitandi.
